tooltips.peOpportunitySource: CRM-owned source context for this sales opportunity.
tooltips.peProductInterest: Chitu-provided product recommendation displayed on the native CRM opportunity; EspoCRM does not generate it.
tooltips.peProductFitScore: Chitu-provided product-fit score; native Opportunity probability remains CRM-owned.
tooltips.peNextAction: Chitu-provided recommended next sales action; it does not create an activity.
tooltips.peEstimatedValue: Optional estimated value context. Native Amount remains the CRM sales amount.
tooltips.peExpectedCloseDate: Optional expected-close context. Native Close Date remains the CRM sales close date.
tooltips.peEmailStatus: Chitu-owned email lifecycle status summary. EspoCRM displays this value but does not generate, approve, send, or process replies.
tooltips.peLastEmailDate: Timestamp of the latest Chitu email lifecycle event synced to EspoCRM.
tooltips.peEmailCampaignName: Human-readable campaign reference synced from Chitu.
tooltips.peEmailReplyStatus: Reply state summary synced from Chitu without message content.
